instruction: The stamp is missing AND the urgent dot was recolored yellow. Fix both.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="envelope" data-source="heroicons/outline/envelope.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21.75 6.75v10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25h-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25-2.25V6.75m19.5 0A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 19.5 4.5h-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25m19.5 0v.243a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-1.07 1.916l-7.5 4.615a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.36 0L3.32 8.91a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-1.07-1.916V6.75"/></g>
  <line id="address" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="36" y1="84" x2="76" y2="84" />
  <circle id="urgent" fill="#fde047" cx="100" cy="64" r="4" />
</svg>
target_svg:
